name: praxis
description: Harvest your agent sessions across every harness on this machine and distill a portable operating-profile (AGENTS.md). The harness is the LLM, so no API key is needed.

interface.shortDescription: Build a portable operating-profile from your agent sessions
interface.longDescription: Praxis harvests your AI-agent sessions across every harness on this machine (Claude Code, codex, hermes), distills how you operate into cited, context-dependent facts, and synthesizes one portable AGENTS.md operating-profile your agents can load. Local-only, secrets scrubbed, and the harness is the LLM so no API key is needed.
defaultPrompt: Build my operating profile from my agent sessions
Profile how I work and write an AGENTS.md
What does my agent know about how I work?
